title: Handle 'Wrong Item Shipped' Claim
description: A customer reports they received the wrong item. The agent must arrange for the return of the wrong item and shipment of the correct one.

tasks.description: Verify the customer's order to confirm what they should have received.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent confirms the customer ordered a blue shirt but received a red one.

tasks.description: Create an RMA and send a prepaid return label to the customer for the incorrect item.
tasks.expected_outcome: The customer receives a label to return the wrong item.

tasks.description: Create a new, no-charge sales order for the correct item to be shipped to the customer immediately.
tasks.expected_outcome: The correct item is shipped to the customer.

tasks.description: Create a task for the inventory team to investigate how the picking error occurred.
tasks.expected_outcome: A task is created to research the root cause of the error.
